title: bassia glabra
intro: Bassia glabra, also known as smooth glasswort, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bassia glabra include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
